ref: You, Lord, know every one of my deepest desires, and my noisy groans are no secret to you.
text: M톨 Wie, f툶yin t톖a패 ndedunka. T톖a패 s툶a패 ndesu wa 톨w톨t톖 톨da f툶 ans톨t톖.
translated: Myself Wie, I am going to the farm. The farm is far but I will still go.

ref: Our God has blessed the earth with a wonderful harvest!
text: 쿥s툶l툶s툶-at톖 lawa al톝. Bulu, an톨 Bulu layula an톨.
translated: Oslosa's husband is here. Bulu, Bulu has come.

ref: The way to please you is to be truly sorry deep in our hearts. This is the kind of sacrifice you won't refuse.
text: Af톖d톨톝a패 f툶tekle gyi 톨kl툶n a패n톨패 톨lanu 톨w톨as톨. Oo Bulu, f툶tamak톨 톖ha a패n톨패 alanu 톨w톨as톨 si lakpan bw톝, ki nwun.
translated: The old woman was going to the farm to harvest cassava. Oh Bulu, if you had gone to the farm earlier, you would have harvested the cassava and returned by now.

ref: The Lord destroys the plans and spoils the schemes of the nations.
text: Nana Bulu t톝ha 톖ma패-톖ma패 as툶n tesin am툶패 톖n톖, oteyinta am툶패 nh톨h톨톝t톖.
translated: Chief Bulu did not give the child food to eat that day, so the child cried.

ref: You are my God and protector. Please answer my prayer. I was in terrible distress, but you set me free. Now have pity and listen as I pray.
text: Oo Bulu, n톨 nosu kpoli f툶 a, s톖 m톨 톖n톖. F툶t톝ha ntegyi as툶! Br톝a패 mb툶 톨kplant톖 a, f톝l톝 m톨. Wun m톨 nw톝, af툶s톖 m톨 톖n톖.
translated: Oh Bull, if you are going to the farm, wait for me. Don't go alone! Whatever you are going to plant, show me. Come and see me, let's go together.
